centertext_templates: release what your {body_part} has been holding
nothing more for your {body_part} to hold
the release spreading through your {body_part} now
that held place in your {body_part} dissolving
permission to let your {body_part} go completely
release moving through your {body_part} on its own
tts_templates: every tight place in your {body_part} knows now it can let go, that there is nothing left to hold, that releasing is the only thing left to do
you've been holding in your {body_part} without realizing it, and as that recognition settles, the release begins on its own, without effort, without asking
notice how your {body_part} softens when you stop asking it to do anything at all — that softening is the release happening now, quietly, on its own
your {body_part} has permission now, full and complete permission, to release every pattern it has been maintaining, to stop, and dissolve, and rest
the release doesn't require any action — just the ending of the action your {body_part} has been taking all along, unconsciously, patiently waiting for this permission
as you exhale now, your {body_part} follows — releasing downward, outward, releasing the shape it's been holding, releasing into something softer and less defined
